install.description: Whether to install/upgrade CRDs from templates/crds/. Set to false to manage CRDs externally.

enabled.description: Create Grafana dashboard ConfigMaps from files/grafana-dashboards/. Run make sync-dashboards after a version bump to refresh.

namespace.description: Namespace for dashboard ConfigMaps. Defaults to .Release.Namespace when empty.

label.description: ConfigMap label key used for Grafana dashboard discovery.

labelValue.description: ConfigMap label value used for Grafana dashboard discovery.

annotations.description: Annotations added to each dashboard ConfigMap (e.g. observability.giantswarm.io/organization).

enabled.description: Create a VerticalPodAutoscaler for the operator. Requires VPA CRDs on the cluster.

updateMode.description: VPA update mode: Auto/Recreate restart pods to apply recommendations; Initial applies only at creation; Off disables updates.

enabled.description: Create a PodMonitor to scrape operator metrics on port 8080.

labels.description: Labels added to the PodMonitor resource. Use 'observability.giantswarm.io/tenant' to route metrics to a Grafana Organization.

workloads.description: PodMonitors for Kafka workloads managed by the operator (cross-namespace).

enabled.description: Create PodMonitors for Kafka, KafkaBridge, and Entity Operator pods across all namespaces.
